name: ruby-typhoeus
title: ruby-typhoeus
summary: parallel HTTP library on top of ethon
description:
parallel HTTP library on top of ethon
Typhoeus is a HTTP client library based on Ethon which wraps libcurl.
Sitting on top of libcurl makes Typhoeus very reliable and fast.
.
Like a modern code version of the mythical beast with 100 serpent heads,
Typhoeus runs HTTP requests in parallel while cleanly encapsulating handling
logic.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-typhoeus because parallel HTTP library on top of ethon.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-typhoeus as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-typhoeus with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-typhoeus --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
